completed_tasks.name: Fix cursor VISIBLE BUT SOLID after window resize
completed_tasks.progress: Fixed in ghostty fork Thread.zig: cursorCancelCallback now restarts blink timer if flags.focused=true when cancel fires. Root cause: ?*void userdata prevented restart; changed to Thread*. Zig 0.15.2 rebuild clean, Rust relinked.

remaining_tasks.name: Retest split pane cursor freeze — verify fixed after cancel-race fix

human_actions_pending.action: UAT: run target/debug/cmux-linux, resize window, verify cursor blinks after resize
human_actions_pending.context: Fix is in ghostty/src/renderer/Thread.zig cursorCancelCallback. Binary at target/debug/cmux-linux.

human_actions_pending.action: UAT: Ctrl+D to split, drag divider, verify cursor blinks in active pane
human_actions_pending.context: Same cancel-race likely covers this path too. Not yet tested.

decisions.decision: Removed false/true focus bounce from both restore_active_pane_focus and connect_resize
decisions.rationale: Bounce permanently kills cursor timer via async cancel race: set_focus(false) initiates cancel (cursor_c_cancel). set_focus(true) arrives before cancel fires — cursor_c.state()==.active — restart skipped — cancel fires — timer dead forever.

decisions.decision: Fix the cancel race in Ghostty Thread.zig cursorCancelCallback, not in cmux Rust code
decisions.rationale: Root cause: cursorCancelCallback had ?*void userdata so it couldn't restart the timer when cancel completed with flags.focused=true. Changed cancel call to pass Thread* self. On cancel completion, if flags.focused=true and cursor_c not active, restart immediately.

decisions.decision: hasVsync() hypothesis was WRONG — DisplayLink=void on Linux, always returns false
decisions.rationale: generic.zig line 39-41: DisplayLink = switch(os) { .macos => ..., else => void }. The hasVsync early-return in drawFrame never fires on Linux. True root cause was the cancel-race.

next_action: UAT: run target/debug/cmux-linux, resize window — cursor must blink. Then Ctrl+D split, drag divider, cursor must blink in active pane. If both pass: commit ghostty submodule pointer + remaining files, write 02-08 SUMMARY.
context_notes: Race: set_focus(false) starts cancel (cursor_c=.active), set_focus(true) arrives before cancel fires (both drained same mailbox pass in wakeupCallback), restart guard sees .active and skips, cancel fires → dead. Fix: cursorCancelCallback(Thread* self): if self.flags.focused && cursor_c != .active → restart. Zig 0.15.2 at /home/twilson/code/cmux-linux/zig-x86_64-linux-0.15.2/zig.
